lineBudgets.rationale: Root app orchestration should not keep absorbing feature state and case-by-case UI wiring.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move focused state or capability workflows into hooks or feature modules before adding new root behavior.

lineBudgets.rationale: Editor should keep user input wiring separate from correction, import, and diagnostics internals.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move editor workflows into adjacent hooks or packages/core helpers.

lineBudgets.rationale: Clipboard adapters should stay limited to writing payloads and fallback selection behavior.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move payload construction and capture preparation into separate preview modules.

lineBudgets.rationale: Compatibility wrapper is small; clipboard implementation remains the real adapter budget surface.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move payload construction and capture preparation into separate preview modules.

lineBudgets.rationale: Generic fenced-code rendering should stay small and delegate syntax styling.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move language-specific formatting or highlighting to syntax helpers.

lineBudgets.rationale: HTML preview frame should own iframe lifecycle and sizing, not export or capture policy.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move document construction, reporting, and capture utilities into pure helpers.

lineBudgets.rationale: HTML screenshot capture is a browser adapter and should not absorb preview action state.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Keep capture primitives here and move action orchestration into hooks.

lineBudgets.rationale: HTML screenshot implementation remains a browser adapter; this hard budget reflects the current dev baseline and blocks further growth.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Keep capture primitives here and move action orchestration into hooks before lowering this budget.

lineBudgets.rationale: JSON preview should remain a focused parser/render/error block.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move parsing and error-location rules to packages/core or utils helpers.

lineBudgets.rationale: Markdown renderer should dispatch blocks, not own each artifact implementation.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move block-specific rendering into separate preview block components.

lineBudgets.rationale: Compatibility wrapper is small; Markdown renderer implementation is the real dispatch budget surface.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move block-specific rendering into separate preview block components.

lineBudgets.rationale: Lexical island mixes AI instruction, caret, keyboard, code fence, table, image, and scroll domains and is the top regression hotspot; this hard budget reflects the current dev baseline and blocks further growth.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Extract self-contained Lexical plugins, AI instruction helpers, and PreviewArtifactDecorator into components/preview/lexical modules, then ratchet this budget down.

lineBudgets.rationale: Nested Markdown rendering and sanitization should stay focused.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move reusable sanitize schema or Markdown transforms into helpers.

lineBudgets.rationale: Mermaid block should own diagram rendering UI, not global preview readiness orchestration.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move readiness polling and copy/export orchestration into preview hooks.

lineBudgets.rationale: Compatibility wrapper is small; Mermaid preview implementation is the real rendering UI budget surface.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move readiness polling and copy/export orchestration into preview hooks.

lineBudgets.rationale: Mermaid capture should remain SVG/PNG normalization and readiness utilities.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move rich-copy action state and toolbar behavior outside capture helpers.

lineBudgets.rationale: Compatibility wrapper is small; the implementation should stay below the capture budget.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Keep future Mermaid capture behavior in narrow helpers instead of growing this implementation.

lineBudgets.rationale: AI selection toolbar owns selection overlay, session state, and streaming display together; this hard budget reflects the current dev baseline and blocks further growth.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move selection session state and streaming display into focused preview hooks before adding new toolbar behavior.

lineBudgets.rationale: Syntax styling should stay as token mapping rather than rendering policy.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Move renderer-specific behavior into block components.

lineBudgets.rationale: Preview markdown editing hook aggregates patching, selection, and editing state; this hard budget reflects the current dev baseline and blocks further growth.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Split patch scheduling, selection tracking, and editing commands into focused hooks before adding new editing behavior.

lineBudgets.rationale: Global shell CSS is the real stylesheet hotspot behind the tiny index.css entrypoint.
lineBudgets.suggestedExtractionTarget: Split shell, preview, account, and responsive CSS into bounded files under a visual-contract plan.
